descriptionText: Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale|Guest Cabins:5|Crew Cabins|5The Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale represents one of the most forward‑thinking concepts in the modern superyacht market. Offered in good condition and built on order, this 50‑metre yacht blends contemporary engineering solutions with clean, balanced design. Sanlorenzo developed the 50STEEL around two core principles—sustainability and intelligent use of space. These values are reflected in every aspect of the project, from the hull form to the interior layout and the pioneering technical systems on board. ( build on order)Specifications:• Brand: Sanlorenzo • Year: Build on Order • Length: 50 m • Max Beam: 9.4 m • Construction: Steel • Draught: 2.9 m • Gross Tonnage: 499 GT • Fuel Tank: 55,000 l • Guest Cabins: 5 • Crew: 5 • Engines: MAN D2862 1450 PSOne of the most distinctive elements of the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale is the HER (Hidden Engine Room) system. This patented arrangement reinterprets the way space is traditionally allocated inside a yacht of this size. By distributing the propulsion equipment horizontally on the lower deck instead of occupying multiple levels, Sanlorenzo created an entirely new area known as the Ocean Lounge. This space sits between the aft Beach Club—with its swimming pool and fold‑out terraces—and the guest accommodation area, allowing for direct flow between relaxation zones, the gym, and the spa. The result is a layout that feels open and connected without interrupting the yacht’s clean exterior lines.Sustainability is another major focus of the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale. It is the first superyacht project to incorporate a modular Green Methanol Fuel Cell system, developed with Siemens Energy. This system converts green methanol into hydrogen and then into electricity to support the yacht’s hotel load or recharge the batteries. It operates without storing hydrogen on board and can supply up to 100 kW of carbon‑neutral power. For owners who enjoy extended periods at anchor, this allows the yacht to function for the majority of its typical usage time with zero emissions and silent operation.The exterior, designed by Zuccon International Project, maintains a simple and balanced profile despite the yacht’s structural complexity. Inside, Piero Lissoni’s design approach brings together contemporary elements with subtle references to classic interiors. He used 3D technology extensively during development, ensuring close alignment between architectural intent and technical execution.The living areas spread across four staggered levels, minimising barriers and enhancing natural light. The main deck salon serves as the social centre of the yacht, while the upper deck offers a second lounge area. The dining room benefits from generous ceiling heights, ranging from 2.1 to 3.35 metres, creating a pleasant sense of openness. The yacht accommodates four guest cabins plus a full‑beam owner’s suite, along with two swimming pools—one on the Beach Club level and another on the sun deck.Overall, the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale combines thoughtful engineering, environmental responsibility and well‑considered design. With its strong condition and innovative features, it offers a compelling opportunity for an owner seeking a modern 50‑metre yacht with a focus on comfort and future‑oriented technology.
descriptionHtml:
Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale|Guest Cabins:5|Crew Cabins|5

The Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale represents one of the most forward‑thinking concepts in the modern superyacht market. Offered in good condition and built on order, this 50‑metre yacht blends contemporary engineering solutions with clean, balanced design. Sanlorenzo developed the 50STEEL around two core principles—sustainability and intelligent use of space. These values are reflected in every aspect of the project, from the hull form to the interior layout and the pioneering technical systems on board.
( build on order)

Specifications:

• Brand: Sanlorenzo
• Year: Build on Order
• Length: 50 m
• Max Beam: 9.4 m
• Construction: Steel
• Draught: 2.9 m
• Gross Tonnage: 499 GT
• Fuel Tank: 55,000 l
• Guest Cabins: 5
• Crew: 5
• Engines: MAN D2862 1450 PS

One of the most distinctive elements of the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale is the HER (Hidden Engine Room) system. This patented arrangement reinterprets the way space is traditionally allocated inside a yacht of this size. By distributing the propulsion equipment horizontally on the lower deck instead of occupying multiple levels, Sanlorenzo created an entirely new area known as the Ocean Lounge. This space sits between the aft Beach Club—with its swimming pool and fold‑out terraces—and the guest accommodation area, allowing for direct flow between relaxation zones, the gym, and the spa. The result is a layout that feels open and connected without interrupting the yacht’s clean exterior lines.

Sustainability is another major focus of the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale. It is the first superyacht project to incorporate a modular Green Methanol Fuel Cell system, developed with Siemens Energy. This system converts green methanol into hydrogen and then into electricity to support the yacht’s hotel load or recharge the batteries. It operates without storing hydrogen on board and can supply up to 100 kW of carbon‑neutral power. For owners who enjoy extended periods at anchor, this allows the yacht to function for the majority of its typical usage time with zero emissions and silent operation.

The exterior, designed by Zuccon International Project, maintains a simple and balanced profile despite the yacht’s structural complexity. Inside, Piero Lissoni’s design approach brings together contemporary elements with subtle references to classic interiors. He used 3D technology extensively during development, ensuring close alignment between architectural intent and technical execution.

The living areas spread across four staggered levels, minimising barriers and enhancing natural light. The main deck salon serves as the social centre of the yacht, while the upper deck offers a second lounge area. The dining room benefits from generous ceiling heights, ranging from 2.1 to 3.35 metres, creating a pleasant sense of openness. The yacht accommodates four guest cabins plus a full‑beam owner’s suite, along with two swimming pools—one on the Beach Club level and another on the sun deck.

Overall, the Sanlorenzo 50STEEL For Sale combines thoughtful engineering, environmental responsibility and well‑considered design. With its strong condition and innovative features, it offers a compelling opportunity for an owner seeking a modern 50‑metre yacht with a focus on comfort and future‑oriented technology.
